heading: Overview of
MBA in Business Intelligence and Analytics

overViewImage.alt: MBA in Business Intelligence and Analytics – Program Overview

overViewOfOnline.subHeading: Step Into the World of BI, Analytics & Decision Intelligence
overViewOfOnline.description: The MBA in Business Intelligence and Analytics at Teksversity builds advanced analytical, technical, and strategic skills required for modern business environments. Learners gain expertise in BI tools, dashboards, data modelling, analytics systems, and visualization techniques. The program integrates practical simulations, reporting tasks, and industry-aligned case studies that help professionals make informed decisions using data. Designed for working individuals, this flexible MBA prepares students for BI development, data analytics, reporting strategy, and insight-generation roles across multiple global industries.
keyPoints: Understand BI, analytics, dashboards, and modelling
Use tools for reporting, visualization, and insights
Strengthen analytical and data interpretation skills
Apply accurate and ethical data practices
Develop leadership for BI and analytics roles

heading: Why Choose MBA in Business Intelligence & Analytics
in Teksversity?
whyOnline.initialDescription: Teksversity offers a BI- and analytics-focused MBA designed to build strong problem-solving and data interpretation skills. Learners engage with dashboards, reporting systems, modelling tools, and real-world data projects that prepare them for practical BI environments.

description.firstDescription: Expert mentors guide students through analytics cases, BI frameworks, visualization techniques, predictive analysis, and performance dashboards. This structured approach helps learners understand how data drives business outcomes.

description.secondDescription: The flexible online model supports working professionals aiming to advance into BI and analytics roles. Resume support, interview preparation, and career guidance ensure a smooth transition into business intelligence, data analytics, and strategic reporting roles.

testimonialCards.review: I enrolled in the online Data Science course at Teksversity in March 2025. The Python, ML modules, real-world projects, and weekly assignments were very useful. Good placement support. It helped me build a strong portfolio. Great for career switchers

testimonialCards.name: Gayathri Prayaga

faq.question: What is an MBA in Business Intelligence & Analytics?
faq.answer: MBA in Business Intelligence & Analytics is a postgraduate program that focuses on data-driven decision-making, business analytics, predictive modelling, data visualization, and strategic insights. It prepares students to analyze complex business data and support organizational growth using modern analytical tools.

faq.question: Who should pursue this course?
faq.answer: This specialization is suitable for graduates interested in analytics, business strategy, data interpretation, and technology-driven decision-making. It is ideal for students aiming to build careers in data analytics, business consulting, management, and IT.

faq.question: What skills will I gain from this specialization?
faq.answer: Students develop skills in data analysis, statistical modelling, data visualization, business strategy, predictive analytics, machine learning basics, dashboard creation, and using analytics tools to solve business problems.

faq.question: What subjects are included in this specialization?
faq.answer: Core subjects include Business Intelligence, Data Analytics, Data Warehousing, Predictive Modelling, Statistical Analysis, Data Mining, Big Data, Business Strategy, Machine Learning Applications, and Data Visualization.

faq.question: What career opportunities are available after completing this MBA?
faq.answer: Graduates can pursue roles such as Business Analyst, Data Analyst, BI Analyst, Data Scientist (entry-level), Analytics Consultant, Market Intelligence Specialist, Operations Analyst, and Strategy Manager in tech, finance, retail, healthcare, and consulting sectors.

faq.question: How does this specialization benefit my career?
faq.answer: The program equips students with analytical and strategic thinking capabilities, making them valuable for organizations that rely on data for decision-making. It opens up high-growth career paths in technology, business strategy, and analytics-driven industries.

faq.question: What is the eligibility criteria for admission to this MBA?
faq.answer: Applicants must have a bachelor’s degree in any discipline from a recognized university. Admissions may be based on merit, entrance exams, interviews, or university-specific selection criteria.

faq.question: Does the program include practical exposure?
faq.answer: Yes. Students work on analytics projects, case studies, industry datasets, internships, and capstone projects involving real-time business intelligence applications.

faq.question: What tools and technologies will I learn?
faq.answer: The course may cover tools such as Excel (Advanced), SQL, Power BI, Tableau, Python (Basics), R, SPSS, Hadoop, machine learning libraries, and data visualization platforms used in modern analytics.

faq.question: What is the salary potential after completing this MBA?
faq.answer: Fresh graduates typically earn ₹6–12 LPA, while professionals with specialized analytical skills may earn ₹12–20 LPA or more, depending on experience, role, and industry demand.
